creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update x11-wm/openbox to 3.4.8, fix plist, etc.

	The attached patch updates openbox to 3.4.8, the latest version.

	It also fixes the plist for users who have x11-themes/clearlooks-themes
	installed, fixes a bug in xdg-autostart that was reported on the
	openbox list, and adds my personal web site as an additional mirror.
	The last bit is optional of course. :)

Fix: Apply the attached patch:
How-To-Repeat: 	DNA
